characters.name: Abishola Wheeler
characters.description: Abishola WheelerNameAbishola Bolatito Doyinsola Oluwatoyin Adebambo WheelerAge37-39FamilyDele Adebambo(son)Olu Olatunji(aunt)Tunde Olatunji(uncle)Ebunoluwa Odegbami(mother)Unnamed Father6 Unnamed Brothers4 Unnamed SistersBlessing(aunt)Oluyeti Olusegun(aunt, deceased)Bola(aunt)Ayo(granduncle)Morenike(cousin)Dottie Wheeler(mother-in-law)Max Wheeler(father-in-law, deceased)Christina Wheeler(sister-in-law)Douglas Wheeler(brother-in-law)Maxine Wheeler(niece)FriendsKemiGloria TylerRomanceBob Wheeler(husband)Tayo Adebambo(ex-husband)Chukwuemeka(dated)ProductionFirst Appearance"Pilot"Final Appearance"Find Your Bench"Episode Count95Portrayed ByFolake Olowofoyeku Abishola Bolatito Doyinsola Oluwatoyin Adebambo Wheeler(néeOdegbami)RNis the mother ofDele Adebambo, the niece ofOluandTunde Olatunji, wife ofBob Wheeler, and one of the main characters on theCBSseriesBob Hearts Abishola. She is portrayed byFolake Olowofoyeku. Born in Nigeria, she relocated to Detroit with her first husband Tayo. Abishola is one of eleven children, and has six brothers and four sisters, though only three have the same mother.[1]She now works as a nurse at Woodward Memorial Hospital in Detroit, where she lives with her son Dele and her aunt and uncle Olu and Tunde in a small apartment. She wants Dele to grow up to be a doctor, but he wants to be a dancer.[2]

characters.name: Bob Wheeler
characters.description: Bob WheelerNameRobert J. WheelerAgeApprox. 53FamilyDottie Wheeler(mother)Max Wheeler(father, deceased 1994)Christina Wheeler(sister)Douglas Wheeler(brother)Rosemary Gilbert(great-grandmother)Ebunoluwa Odegbami(mother-in-law)Dele Adebambo(step-son)Tunde Olatunji(uncle-in-law)Olu Olatunji(aunt-in-law)Maxine Wheeler(niece)FriendsAbishola WheelerRomanceAbishola Wheeler(wife)Lorraine Wheeler(ex-wife)ProductionFirst Appearance"Pilot"Final Appearance"Find Your Bench"Episode Count95Portrayed ByBilly GardellRobert J. "Bob" Wheeleris the son ofDottieand brother ofDouglasandChristinaand one of the main characters in theCBSseriesBob Hearts Abishola. He is portrayed byBilly Gardell. Originally from Detroit, Bob is a compression sock businessman who, after suffering a heart attack, unexpectedly falls for his cardiac nurse, a Nigerian immigrant namedAbishola. Despite being in the process of recovering from a heart attack, Bob becomes intent on winning the nurse's heart, undaunted by her apparent lack of interest and the vast differences in their backgrounds.

characters.name: Gloria Tyler
characters.description: Gloria TylerNameGloria TylerAgeMid to late sixtiesFamilyUnnamed MotherJames Tyler (son)FriendsAbishola WheelerKemiRomanceUnnamed HusbandUnnamed Ex-HusbandProductionFirst Appearance"Pilot"Latest Appearance"Find Your Bench"Episode Count87Portrayed ByVernee Watson Gloria TylerMDRNis a character in theCBSseriesBob Hearts Abishola. She is portrayed byVernee Watson. She is a registered nurse at Woodward Memorial Hospital, and a friend ofAbishola's. In the episodeTLC: Tunde's Loving Care, Gloria reveals she was accepted, attended, and completed medical school making her an MD. However, she did not complete a residency as the hospital she was working at shut down after a short period of time.

characters.name: Lorraine Wheeler
characters.description:
Lorraine WheelerNameLorraine WheelerAgeUnknownRomanceBob Wheeler(ex-husband)ProductionFirst Appearance"Sock Wife!"Latest Appearance"We Don't Rat on Family"Episode Count3Portrayed ByNicole SullivanLorraine Wheeleris a character inBob Hearts Abishola. She is played byNicole Sullivan. She isBob Wheeler's ex-wife. She is admitted to Woodward Memorial Hospital in Detroit, whereAbishola Adebamboworks.Bobis still furious with her for cheating on him with his best friend. When he learns she has met Abishola, he goes to see her at the hospital to tell her to stay out of his life. However, Abishola urges him to forgive her. 
Lorraine sees his lack of hostility as a chance at reconciliation.[1]
